---
pagetitle: "Teaching"
toc: false
email-obfuscation: javascript
description: "Teaching materials and courses offered by Prof. Philipp Pelz at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg, covering computational imaging and electron microscopy."

---

```{=html}
<style>
.lecture-card {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  height: 608px; /* Reduced height so the landscape background image isn't heavily zoomed/cropped by `cover` */
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 12px;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}
.lecture-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}
.lecture-card-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  z-index: 2;
}
.lecture-card-body {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  z-index: 3;
  color: white;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.lecture-title {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  color: white;
  line-height: 1.3;
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}
.lecture-meta {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
</style>
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Teaching</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Summer Semester 2026

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 33%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_MG.jpg');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Materialgenomik</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Tue 16:15h - 17:45h<br>
    📍 0.68 WW building
  </div>
  <a href="https://pelzlab.science/MaterialsGenomics/" class="btn btn-primary lecture-link" style="align-self: flex-start;">Website</a>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 33%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_ML-PC.jpg');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Machine Learning for <br>Processing & Characterization</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Tue 14:15h - 15:45h<br>
    📍 0.68 WW building
  </div>
  <!-- <a href="https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/489020" class="btn btn-secondary lecture-link" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem; align-self: flex-start;">Studon</a> -->
  <a href="https://pelzlab.science/MachineLearningForCharacterizationAndProcessing/" class="btn btn-primary lecture-link" style="align-self: flex-start;">Website</a>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 34%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_MF-AIML.jpg');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Mathematical Foundations <br> of AI/ML</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Mon 10:15h - 11:45h<br>
    📍 Rm 01.156 IZNF
  </div>
  <!-- <a href="https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/491599" class="btn btn-secondary lecture-link" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem; align-self: flex-start;">Studon</a> -->
  <a href="https://pelzlab.science/MathematicalFoundationsForAIML/" class="btn btn-primary lecture-link" style="align-self: flex-start;">Website</a>
</div>
```
:::

::::



## Winter Semester 2025/2026

- Lecture Materials & Structure (MAP)
  - Fr 10:15h - 11:45h H10
  <!-- - [studon](https://www.studon.fau.de/studon) -->

- Lecture Data Science for Electron Microscopy
  - Fr 12:15h - 13:45h IZNF Rm 01.160
  <!-- - [studon](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/489020) -->
  - [website](https://pelzlab.science/DataScienceForElectronMicroscopy/)

- Seminar Machine Learning for Microscopy
  - Fr 14:15h - 15:45h IZNF Rm 01.160
  <!-- - [studon](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/491599) -->
  - [website](https://pelzlab.science/MachineLearningForMicroscopy/)

## Summer Semester 2025

- Lecture Materials & Structure (Clean Energy Processes)
  - Tue 10:15h - 11:45h Seminar Room 0.68 WW building
  - [studon](https://www.studon.fau.de/studon)

- Lecture Data Science for Electron Microscopy
  - Tue 16:15h - 17:45h IZNF Rm 01.160
  - [studon](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/489020)
  - [website](https://pelzlab.science/DataScienceForElectronMicroscopy/)

- Seminar Machine Learning for Microscopy
  - Thu 16:15h - 17:45h IZNF Rm 01.160
  - [studon](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/491599)
  - [website](https://pelzlab.science/MachineLearningForMicroscopy/)

- Seminar Materials & Structure (Clean Energy Processes)
  - Thu 16:15h - 17:45h Seminar Room 0.68 WW building
  - [studon](https://www.studon.fau.de/studon/ilias.php?baseClass=ilrepositorygui&cmdNode=116:p8&cmdClass=ilObjCourseGUI&cmd=view&ref_id=6216946)
  - [website](https://pelzlab.science/MaterialsAndStructureSeminar/)

## Winter Semester 2024

[Lecture Materials & Structure (MAP): Fr 10:15h - 11:45h Seminar Room 0.68 WW building](https://www.studon.fau.de/studon)

[Lecture Data Science for Electron Microscopy: Fr 8:30h - 10h IZNF Rm 01.160](https://pelzlab.science/DataScienceForElectronMicroscopy/)

[Seminar Machine Learning for Microscopy: Wed 8:30h - 10:00h IZNF Rm 01.140](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/421966)

## Summer Semester 2024

[Lecture Materials & Structure (BSc Clean Energy Processes): Thu 10:15h - 11:45h](https://www.studon.fau.de/studon/goto.php?target=crs_5609585&client_id=StudOn)

[Lecture Data Science for Electron Microscopy: Wed 10:15h - 11:45h IZNF Rm 01.160](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/421992)

[Seminar Machine Learning for Microscopy: Wed 8:30h - 10:00h IZNF Rm 01.160](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/421966)

## Winter Semester 2023

[Lecture Materials & Structure](https://www.studon.fau.de/crs5223702_join.html)

[Lecture Data Science for Electron Microscopy: Tue 8:30h - 10:00h IZNF Rm 01.160](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/401180)

[Seminar Machine Learning for Microscopy: Thu 8:30h - 10:00h IZNF Rm 01.160](https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/401181)

## Summer Semester 2023

Lecture Materials & Structure

Lecture Data Science for Electron Microscopy

Seminar Machine Leanring for Microscopy
